_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Complication of HIV disease is its progression to acquired immunodeficiency syndrome (AIDS). It should be suspected once opportunistic infections and/or low CD4 count are present in an individual who is HIV positive.

AIDS occurs when lymphocyte count falls below a level (less than 200 cells per microliters) and is characterized by one or more of the following: Tuberculosis (TB) and extra pulmonary tuberculosis, Cytomegalovirus, Candidiasis, Cryptococcal meningitis, Cryptosporidiosis, Toxoplasmosis, Kaposi's sarcoma, Lymphoma, Neurological complications (AIDS dementia complex), Kidney disease.

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, and planned line of treatment

claim.label: Detailed indoor case papers and treatment given

ppd_preauth.q: Does the patient have any opportunistic infections?

common_queries: CD4 cell count report not submitted.
HIV-ELISA/HIV viral load report not submitted (optional document).
Documentation/investigation report confirming diagnosis of HIV not available.
Lack of documented opportunistic infections despite HIV diagnosis, crucial for 'HIV with complications' package.
Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indications, or planned line of treatment not submitted at pre-authorization.
Detailed indoor case papers or discharge summary not submitted at claim stage, or discharge summary lacks follow-up date.

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: DNB / MD (General Medicine / Pediatric Medicine/ Dermatology & Venereology)
